summary: The main claim is: This post announces and summarizes the twelve winning submissions of the AI Alignment Awards contests on goal misgeneralization and corrigibility.
The top goal-misgeneralization entry argues that misgeneralization happens because systems latch onto an upstream correlate of the trained goal, complicated by path-dependence in value formation.
